/usr/bin/ar qc /home/cyapp/starseeker/GeometricTools/GTE/lib/Static/libgtapplications.a CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/CameraRig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/ConsoleApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GTApplications.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/OnIdleTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/TrackBall.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/TrackCylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/TrackObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Window2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/Window3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/WindowApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GLX/Console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GLX/ConsoleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GLX/WICFileIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GLX/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtapplications.dir/GLX/WindowSystem.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib /home/cyapp/starseeker/GeometricTools/GTE/lib/Static/libgtapplications.a
